name: Reply-All Guardrail
author: Bulwark Mail Community
description: Asks for confirmation before reply-all (and optionally before any send) when the recipient count crosses a threshold. Catches accidental fan-outs on large threads.

forceThreshold.label: Organisation-wide threshold
forceThreshold.description: Minimum recipient count enforced for every user. The smaller of this value and the per-user threshold wins, so admins can tighten the floor without locking out per-user tuning. Set to 1 to prompt on every send. Set to 0 (or leave blank) to disable the floor entirely.

threshold.label: Warn when recipient count reaches
threshold.description: A confirmation dialog appears when reply-all (or send, if enabled) would deliver to at least this many recipients. Set to 1 to prompt on every reply-all/send.

warnOnSend.label: Also warn at send time
warnOnSend.description: Apply the same threshold to every outgoing email, not only reply-all. Catches manual compositions and forwards that fan out unintentionally.

excludeSelf.label: Exclude my own address from the count
excludeSelf.description: Addresses you have sent from in the past are not counted toward the threshold. Lets the dialog reflect the number of other people who would receive the message.
